creator: andrej@ebert.su
text:
Created attachment 172059
py-dogpile.cache update to 0.6.1

Update to 0.6.1, removed the devel/py-dogpile.core dependency, as it was merged into dogpile.cache, see: https://bitbucket.org/zzzeek/dogpile.cache/issues/91/merge-dogpilecore-into-dogpilecache

It builds, installs, deinstalls and works fine on my system:FreeBSD 10.3-BETA3 #0 r296162 amd64 and also passes portlint.
